es.ROLE_REMOVED_DESC: Se ha quitado el rol {role} a {user}

es.CLEAR_NO_PERM: ❌ No tienes permisos para gestionar mensajes.

es.PREMIUM_KICK_SELF: ❌ No puedes expulsarte a ti mismo.
es.PREMIUM_KICK_OWNER: ❌ No puedes expulsar al dueño del servidor.

*⏳ Se autodestruirá en 10 segundos...*

es.PREMIUM_NICK_ERROR: ❌ No pude cambiar tu apodo. Puede que mi rol no tenga permisos suficientes.

en.HELP_DESC: Use the buttons below to navigate through categories.

en.ROLE_CANT_ADD: I can't add that role. Check my permissions and role position.
en.ROLE_DOESNT_HAVE: The user doesn't have that role.
en.ROLE_CANT_REMOVE: I can't remove that role. Check my permissions and role position.

en.ROLE_REMOVED_DESC: The role {role} has been removed from {user}

en.SLOWMODE_ERROR: There was an error changing the slow mode.
en.FORUM_ERROR: There was an error creating the post. Make sure the bot has permissions and the tags are valid.

en.CLEAR_ERROR: ❌ There was an error. Make sure I have the Manage Messages permission.
en.CLEAR_NO_PERM: ❌ You don't have permissions to manage messages.
en.ECONOMY_DAILY_WAIT_DESC: You already claimed your daily today. Come back in **{hours} hour(s)**.

> {SC} You received **+{reward} Solecoins** in your wallet.
> Come back tomorrow to claim again.

> You worked as a **{job}** and earned **+{payment} {SC} Solecoins**.
> You can work again in **1 hour**.
en.ECONOMY_WORK_INFINITE: > You worked as **{job}**. Your coins are **infinite** {SC} ✨
en.ECONOMY_GAMBLE_AMOUNT_ERROR: ❌ The amount must be greater than 0 {SC}.
en.ECONOMY_GAMBLE_NO_FUNDS: ❌ You don't have enough {SC} Solecoins. Your balance: **{balance}**.
en.ECONOMY_GAMBLE_WIN_DESC: > You bet **{amount} {SC}** and **won**. **+{amount} {SC}** were added to your wallet.
en.ECONOMY_GAMBLE_LOSE_DESC: > You bet **{amount} {SC}** and **lost**. **-{amount} {SC}** were deducted from your wallet.
en.PREMIUM_LIST_DESC: Exclusive features for **VIP** members. Get Premium with `/shop`.

📅 Expires on: `{date}`

❌ You don't have an active Premium subscription.
🛒 Use `/shop` to buy one with Solecoins.
en.PREMIUM_NO_PREMIUM: <a:no:1385229842282446898> This command is exclusive to **Premium** users. Buy your subscription at `/shop`.

en.PREMIUM_USER_NOT_FOUND: ❌ User not found in this server.
en.PREMIUM_BLOCK_HIERARCHY: ❌ You cannot use this on someone with equal or higher roles than yours.
en.PREMIUM_BOT_NO_PERM: ❌ I don't have permission to manage this channel.

en.PREMIUM_BLOCK_DESC: {target} has been blocked from this channel.

en.PREMIUM_KICK_OWNER: ❌ You cannot kick the server owner.
en.PREMIUM_KICK_HIERARCHY: ❌ You cannot kick someone with equal or higher roles than yours.
en.PREMIUM_KICK_BOT_CANT: ❌ I cannot kick this user. They may have a higher role than mine.

👻 **Ghost Message from {user}:** {msg}
*⏳ It will self-destruct in 10 seconds...*

en.PREMIUM_NICK_HIERARCHY: ❌ I cannot change the nickname of someone with equal or higher roles than mine.
en.PREMIUM_NICK_DESC: Your nickname has been updated with Premium decoration.
en.PREMIUM_NICK_ERROR: ❌ I couldn't change your nickname. My role may not have enough permissions.

✨ **{user}**, your profile now radiates the Premium aura.

> 🌟 **Aura:** Golden VIP
